rawAssistant: You're heading into marsh territory, eh? With Emberfox poisoned, you'll want to get her some Antidote and a Cold Salve for those burn marks. I've got just what you need - my Antidote potion is top-notch, made from the finest swamp herbs. And my Cold Salve will help ease the pain before it sets in. Might I interest you in a few road kits to boot?
